inputConfigurations.targetQuery:
select
bank_id as bank_id,
au_nr as au_num,
trim(bank_site_city_nm) as bank_site_city_nm,
bank_site_st_cd as bank_site_st_cd,
substring(trim(bank_site_pstl_cd),1,5) as bank_site_pstl_cd,
efct_dt as eff_dt,
expr_dt as expir_dt,
initcap(bank_stat_nm) as bank_stat_nm
from %mrd_fndd_conformed%.loc_site_bank_h
where %bus_eff_dt% >= src_efct_dt and %bus_eff_dt% < expr_dt
and eapp_dct_business_effective_date = '%eapp_dct_business_effective_date%'
